member.name: P:TimeAngle.Models.TimeAngleRequest.Time
member.summary: Combined time in HH:MM format. Example: 03:30

member.name: P:TimeAngle.Models.TimeAngleRequest.Hour
member.summary: Hour component when using separate parameters. Valid range: 0-12.

member.name: P:TimeAngle.Models.TimeAngleRequest.Minutes
member.summary: Minute component when using separate parameters. Valid range: 0-59.
